title: Speed-to-value frame resurfaces in 62% of discovery calls
anchor: Gong analysis of 27 April discovery calls shows speed-to-value re-stated by prospects in 17 conversations.
connect: Platform-consolidation frame appears in 19% of calls over the same period.
body: Gong analysis of 27 April discovery calls shows speed-to-value re-stated by prospects in 17 conversations. Platform-consolidation frame appears in 19% of calls over the same period.
trace: Speed-to-value positioning from Q1 last year is re-emerging in prospect language after the Q2 rebrand attempt.

title: Beacon Systems win rate climbs to 64% in head-to-head deals
anchor: Q2 competitive outcomes show 14-8 record across 22 direct battles with Beacon Systems.
connect: Prior four-quarter average Beacon win rate sat at 28%.
body: Q2 competitive outcomes show 14-8 record across 22 direct battles with Beacon Systems. Prior four-quarter average Beacon win rate sat at 28%.
trace: Dramatic improvement in Beacon head-to-head performance coincides with increased battlecard utilization.

title: Battlecard utilization jumps to 61% on competitive opportunities
anchor: Q2 tracking shows 38 of 62 Beacon competitive deals included battlecard opens by the assigned rep.
connect: Q1 battlecard utilization ran at 22% across competitive opportunities.
body: Q2 tracking shows 38 of 62 Beacon competitive deals included battlecard opens by the assigned rep. Q1 battlecard utilization ran at 22% across competitive opportunities.
trace: Battlecard adoption nearly tripled quarter-over-quarter, correlating with improved win rates against Beacon Systems.

title: Verge IO appears in 24% of Q2 competitive deals
anchor: Verge IO showed up in 18 of 75 competitive opportunities this quarter, concentrated in mid-market segment.
connect: Q1 Verge IO appearance rate was 11% across competitive deals.
body: Verge IO showed up in 18 of 75 competitive opportunities this quarter, concentrated in mid-market segment. Q1 Verge IO appearance rate was 11% across competitive deals.
trace: Verge IO competitive presence doubled following their $40M Series B in March, with concentration in mid-market deals.

title: April 8 launch generates $420K pipeline in first three weeks
anchor: Atlas CRM Sync launch produced 14 new opportunities totaling $420,000 in qualified pipeline.
connect: Prior launch in October generated $310,000 over the same timeline.
body: Atlas CRM Sync launch produced 14 new opportunities totaling $420,000 in qualified pipeline. Prior launch in October generated $310,000 over the same timeline.
trace: Launch pipeline generation improved 35% versus prior launch, with stronger early-stage qualification.

title: Launch-attributable pipeline reaches 18% of Q2 net new
anchor: Launch campaigns contributed $620,000 of the quarter's $3,400,000 total net new pipeline.
connect: April 8 launch accounts for $420,000 of the launch-attributable total.
body: Launch campaigns contributed $620,000 of the quarter's $3,400,000 total net new pipeline. April 8 launch accounts for $420,000 of the launch-attributable total.
trace: Launch motion represents nearly one-fifth of net new pipeline, with April launch as the primary driver.

title: Asset-opening reps generate 2.4x pipeline versus non-adopters
anchor: First 14 days post-launch show reps who opened battlecard or one-pager produced pipeline at 2.4x the rate.
connect: Launch asset adoption reached 71% with 27 of 38 reps engaging materials.
body: First 14 days post-launch show reps who opened battlecard or one-pager produced pipeline at 2.4x the rate. Launch asset adoption reached 71% with 27 of 38 reps engaging materials.
trace: Clear correlation between sales enablement adoption and pipeline generation in the immediate post-launch window.

title: ICP match rate climbs to 78% on new logo wins
anchor: Q2 new customer analysis shows 28 of 36 wins aligned with the defined ideal customer profile.
connect: Q1 ICP match rate was 64% across new logo acquisitions.
body: Q2 new customer analysis shows 28 of 36 wins aligned with the defined ideal customer profile. Q1 ICP match rate was 64% across new logo acquisitions.
trace: Significant improvement in ICP alignment coincides with refreshed positioning and improved discovery call messaging.

title: ICP-aligned deals close 12 days faster than non-ICP wins
anchor: Cycle time analysis shows ICP-matched opportunities move through stages with 12-day velocity advantage.
connect: Speed-to-value positioning resonates in 62% of sampled discovery calls.
body: Cycle time analysis shows ICP-matched opportunities move through stages with 12-day velocity advantage. Speed-to-value positioning resonates in 62% of sampled discovery calls.
trace: ICP alignment produces both higher win rates and faster cycle times, with positioning framework contributing to qualification clarity.

title: Northstar objection handling boosts win rate to 51%
anchor: Post-April 8 battlecard update shows 51% win rate versus Northstar Platform in head-to-head deals.
connect: Pre-update Northstar win rate sat at 42% over the same competitive set.
body: Post-April 8 battlecard update shows 51% win rate versus Northstar Platform in head-to-head deals. Pre-update Northstar win rate sat at 42% over the same competitive set.
trace: Specific objection-handling section added to battlecard correlates with 9-point win rate improvement versus Northstar.

title: Northstar mentions drop 22% following battlecard update
anchor: Gong transcript analysis shows Northstar references decreased across four weeks following April 8 objection section release.
connect: Win rate improvement to 51% occurred over the same four-week window.
body: Gong transcript analysis shows Northstar references decreased across four weeks following April 8 objection section release. Win rate improvement to 51% occurred over the same four-week window.
trace: Reduced competitor mentions in calls correlates with improved win rates, suggesting more effective objection handling.

title: Earned media pickup rate reaches 42% on April launch
anchor: 22 of 53 targeted publications covered the Atlas CRM Sync announcement across earned outreach.
connect: Prior launch achieved 28% pickup rate with the same publication set.
body: 22 of 53 targeted publications covered the Atlas CRM Sync announcement across earned outreach. Prior launch achieved 28% pickup rate with the same publication set.
trace: Earned media performance improved significantly, with higher pickup rates correlating with stronger pipeline generation.

title: May 15 launch clears readiness 10 days ahead of ship
anchor: Atlas Forecast Pro positioning brief, battlecard update, and sales briefing signed off May 5th.
connect: Prior launch positioning brief cleared just 2 days before ship date.
body: Atlas Forecast Pro positioning brief, battlecard update, and sales briefing signed off May 5th. Prior launch positioning brief cleared just 2 days before ship date.
trace: Launch readiness process improved dramatically with all enablement materials completed well ahead of ship date.

title: Enterprise inbound conversion lifts 8 points with new positioning

connect: Enterprise inbound pipeline totals $290,000 over the same period.
body: Q2 enterprise inbound-to-meeting conversion shows 8-point improvement using refreshed positioning hook. Enterprise inbound pipeline totals $290,000 over the same period.

title: Close reason capture reaches 92% in Q2 deal records

connect: Q1 close reason capture sat at 71% across closed opportunities.
body: CRM analysis shows 47 of 51 closed deals included structured outcome reasons in Salesforce. Q1 close reason capture sat at 71% across closed opportunities.

title: Customer exit themes feed competitive positioning updates

body: 14 April exit interviews surfaced 6 themes, with 2 directly informing positioning revision work. Implementation timeline and integration breadth themes appear in 31% of Beacon competitive deals.
trace: Customer success exit data creates competitive intelligence feedback loop, with themes appearing frequently in competitive situations.

title: Mid-market closes at 31% using speed-to-value hierarchy

connect: Enterprise segment closes at 13% on the same messaging framework.
body: Q2 refreshed positioning shows 31% close rate in mid-market segment deals. Enterprise segment closes at 13% on the same messaging framework.
trace: Speed-to-value positioning performs significantly better in mid-market versus enterprise, suggesting segment-specific resonance.

title: Launch-week pipeline generation doubles prior launch pace

connect: Earned media pickup improved to 42% versus 28% on the prior launch.
body: First 7 days of April launch produced 2.0x the pipeline versus October launch opening week. Earned media pickup improved to 42% versus 28% on the prior launch.
